title: oldenlandia pumila
intro: Oldenlandia pumila, also known as the dwarf oldenlandia or Chinese creepweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rubiaceae. It is traditionally used in medicine, particularly in Chinese and Ayurvedic practices, for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antipyretic properties, which help to relieve fever, reduce swelling, and combat infections. The health benefits of Oldenlandia pumila include its ability to improve respiratory health, boost the immune system, and treat various types of infections, such as those caused by bacteria and viruses. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
